  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Agent
    A processing unit in the publish/subscribe computational graph.
    BinOpAgent
    Binary-operation agent that combines two numeric input topics and publishes the result to one output topic.
    Config
    Creates and closes a complete computational graph configuration.
    ConfLoader
    Loads a configuration from an HTTP POST body, deploys it through GenericConfig, and returns the generated graph HTML.
    GenericConfig
    Generic file-backed configuration loader.
    Graph
    Directed computational graph built from the current TopicManager state.
    HtmlGraphWriter
    Converts a computational Graph into simple SVG-based HTML.
    HtmlLoader
    Serves static HTML files from a configured directory for requests below the /app/ URI prefix.
    HTTPServer
    Minimal reusable HTTP server API used by the project controller layer.
    IncAgent
     
    MathExampleConfig
     
    Message
    Immutable message value passed between topics and agents.
    MyHTTPServer
    Threaded HTTP server implementation with bounded worker concurrency.
    Node
    A directed graph node used to visualize and validate computational graphs.
    ParallelAgent
     
    PlusAgent
     
    RequestParser
    Parses the subset of HTTP requests required by the project server.
    RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Immutable parsed request data passed from the HTTP server to servlets.
    Servlet
    Handles a parsed HTTP request and writes a complete HTTP response.
    Topic
    A named publish/subscribe channel in the computational graph.
    TopicDisplayer
    Publishes an optional topic/message query and returns an HTML table of latest topic values.
    TopicManagerSingleton
     
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
